description_long: This futuristic airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a predominantly gray exterior accented by red and blue markings, including the identifier 'UGSF 47' on the side. The wings are swept and curve downward, giving the aircraft a distinctive, aggressive profile, while the rear section houses two prominent engine nacelles. The nose is pointed and streamlined, suggesting high-speed capability, and the cockpit is integrated smoothly into the forward section of the fuselage with a subtle canopy outline. The underside and rear views reveal complex intakes and exhausts, as well as structural reinforcements and aerodynamic surfaces. The airplane appears to be constructed primarily from metal alloys, with some composite materials likely used for aerodynamic surfaces. Its overall design suggests a high-performance, possibly military or advanced urban transport role.
description: A sleek, futuristic gray airplane with swept, downward-curving wings, red and blue accents, and a streamlined, pointed nose. The design features prominent rear engine nacelles and integrated forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, the 'UGSF 47' marking, and the downward-curving swept wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin engine nacelles, exhausts, and the angular structure of the tail and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible blue paneling, 'UGSF' markings, and the same wing and fuselage features as the other side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, integrated cockpit canopy, and the wide, aggressive stance of the swept wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept, downward-curving (anhedral) wings and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into rear fuselage nacelles.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizer connecting them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, tricycle configuration with main and nose gear bays visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage with a single canopy.
